items.title: Follow up with Sai at Discern Security on catch-up request
items.context: Email from fan@fin.capital to sai@discernsecurity.com on May 18: 'If you are open to a quick catch-up call, I would love to learn more about the latest developments.' No response received yet — 6 days since outreach.

items.title: Align with Rina on Opti positioning for Donna ahead of SMBC AD meeting
items.context: Email from ryo.ishii@smbcgroup.com on May 16: 'I'd love to circle back as we prepare for the upcoming AD management meeting, especially to align on the key messages for Donna.' SMBC AD meeting is May 27.

items.title: Review Prism Layer seed round pitch deck before May 26 in-person meeting
items.context: Email from simone@prismlayer.ai on May 15 sharing 'PL Pitch Deck v4' attachment. In-person meeting scheduled for May 26 at Fin Capital SF office with Logan, Jake, Derek, and Claire.

items.title: Prep key messages for Donna ahead of SMBC AD management meeting on May 27
items.context: Calendar event 'SMBC AD management meeting about SMBC Fin Atlas Beyond Fund' on May 27 with 24 attendees from SMBC and Fin Capital. Ryo Ishii requested alignment on key messages for Donna regarding Opti, VanishID, and iVerify enterprise security introductions.

items.title: Prep for Workday Ventures catch-up on May 28
items.context: Calendar event 'Fin Capital <> Workday Ventures' on May 28 with Jeffrey Wantman, Savannah Greene, Sarah Ospina from Workday, and Fan Wen + Derek Wu from Fin Capital.
